title: Manga Shinji Ikaris Detective Journal
wikitext:
[]: [Manga] Shinji Ikari's Detective Journal             Quote Post by mysterysax » Sun Jan 24, 2010 3:37 pm Looks like there is a new branch in the Evangelion tree. Its called: Shinji Ikari's Detective Journal Here's the news report. http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2010-01-24/new-evangelion-manga-2-other-titles-to-launch-in-asuka

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Sun Jan 24, 2010 3:52 pm My favorite part of Evangelion, when Shinji was a detective!..... wait.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Jan 24, 2010 4:09 pm so..what is this Asuka magazine in question?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jan 24, 2010 4:29 pm News post created .

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jan 24, 2010 4:32 pm Does this shit never end?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Jan 24, 2010 6:46 pm Another milk in spin off huh? I think I will pass.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Sun Jan 24, 2010 6:49 pm A bishy Shinji? That made me lol. Might check this out just for the lulz. (I did enjoy that shoenun spinoff they did)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 24, 2010 8:14 pm Is this another game turned into manga spin-off ? Or is it meant to be an original story? By the way, the Anthology Monthly Asuka also featured the Girlfriend of Steel 2 and Gakuen Datenroku manga when it was being published in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Jan 24, 2010 8:19 pm Detective Shinji? We are one step closer to the Civil War-themed inspirational sports movie Eva manga spinoff! At this rate it'll happen someday. It has to. We've had nearly everything else.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jan 24, 2010 9:37 pm A fifth Evangelion manga series? lollerskates.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun Jan 24, 2010 9:45 pm Looks like there is a new branch in the Evangelion tree. Its called: Shinji Ikari's Detective Journal Here's the news report. http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2010-01-24/new-evangelion-manga-2-other-titles-to-launch-in-asuka

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 24, 2010 10:06 pm ran1: Since you're a new member and because emoticons should be used sparingly, more substance in a post is good, please try to avoid using emoticons where actual text can be used instead. Anyway, I'm 50% sure this is going to be based off of the Detective Evangelion game but I guess we'll see. And that reminds me: Marzen in the Gakuen Dantenroku thread wrote: According to some of the notes in the third volume of Shinji Ikari Raising Project, a new Evangelion manga will be released by Dark Horse in the summer of 2010. I suppose it's this one.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Jan 24, 2010 10:18 pm so that's the game Nick used footage from in one of his videos? At least I finally know which one it is

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Sun Jan 24, 2010 10:45 pm I suppose in the next one Shinji will be a serial killer who only kills Angels and Rei will be his sexy accomplice

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Jan 24, 2010 11:47 pm Why must they make Kaworu so hot...;___;.....want.

[]:             Quote Post by giuliano » Mon Jan 25, 2010 3:20 am Sailor Star Dust: I've got that volume of Shinji Ikari Raising Project - it's definitely Gakuen Dantenroku Dark Horse have picked up. They describe it in enough detail to confirm (I'd quote it, but am about to go to work). I will buy this, because I'll buy any Evangelion manga that comes out, but I really hope it's better than Angelic Days... I'm glad it's got a different scenario to the typical high-school romance drama at least.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Mon Jan 25, 2010 4:17 am GasmaskAvenger wrote: so..what is this Asuka magazine in question?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Jan 25, 2010 5:24 am With Rebuild around, it's not surprising that the cash-cow machine is in full swing. esselfortium wrote: Detective Shinji? We are one step closer to the Civil War-themed inspirational sports movie Eva manga spinoff! At this rate it'll happen someday. It has to. We've had nearly everything else.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 25, 2010 6:04 am This sounds interesting. Shinji as a detective... whowouldathunkit?

[]:             Quote Post by RogueEvangalion » Mon Jan 25, 2010 2:50 pm This should be great, I want to check it out to so I can laugh at it, whats next, evangalion: Eva wars or attack of the Evas, come on people be more original
summary:
[]: [Manga] Shinji Ikari's Detective Journal             Quote Post by mysterysax » Sun Jan 24, 2010 3:37 pm Looks like there is a new branch in the Evangelion tree. Its called: Shinji Ikari's Detective Journal Here's the news report. http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2010-01-24/new-evangelion-manga-2-other-titles-to-launch-in-asuka

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey &raq
